title: Sumac Velveteen Sous-Vide
description: A salty, velvety French dish featuring sumac and prepared using sous-vide for a tender and flavorful texture.

ingredients.name: Beef brisket
ingredients.notes: Kosher beef, preferably aged for at least a month

ingredients.name: Apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: For tenderizing and flavoring the meat

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Fine sea salt or kosher salt

ingredients.name: Balsamic glaze (optional)
ingredients.notes: For additional sweetness and depth of flavor

instructions: Wash the brisket thoroughly, dry it well with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix apple cider vinegar and salt until dissolved. Apply this marinade to both sides of the brisket, ensuring even coverage.
Place the brisket in the sous-vide pouch with a portion of balsamic glaze if desired. Seal the bag and cook for 48 hours at 57°C (134°F).
After cooking, let it rest for about 20 minutes before slicing thinly across the grain.
Sear slices on high heat in a hot pan or grill until golden brown on both sides. Brush with remaining balsamic glaze if using.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges and sumac dusted over the top.
